betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Heavy Duty Element§f

§aReinforced structural components — critical for Gerald and the most demanding plasma forge recipes!§f

§bHeavy Duty Elements§f (hbm:part_generic:4) are ultra-reinforced structural components used in the most demanding endgame applications. They are forged in the §bPlasma Forge§f and require both §bStellar Flux§f and significant plasma input energy.

§6Production§f:
Forged in the §bPlasma Forge§f requiring:
§b• §e10 MHE/t§f power
§b• §e1 MTU/t§f plasma input energy
§b• §bStellar Flux§f — a key ingredient produced by the ICF reactor
§b• Duration: §e40 seconds§f

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bGerald The Construction Android§f — requires §e64§f heavy duty elements (per layer, 4 layers = 256 total!)
§b• §bPlasma Forge Recipes§f — heavy duty elements are used in multiple late-game forge recipes

§eTip§f: Heavy duty elements are EXTREMELY expensive. Gerald alone requires 256 of them (64 per slot × 4 slots). Each one requires stellar flux from the ICF. Do not start Gerald production until your ICF is running reliably and you have a large stellar flux buffer!
